disclaimer: AI-assisted research from public web sources — indicative, verify before quoting a client.

JOOL SUITES.note: Freehold boutique block of 52 predominantly micro-unit apartments completed circa 2013, a ~4-minute walk to Farrer Park MRT (North East Line) in the Little India/Farrer Park rental belt. No en-bloc activity found.

SELETAR PARK RESIDENCE.note: 99-year leasehold, 276 units, TOP 2015, in Seletar Hills Estate with no MRT within walking distance (nearest Ang Mo Kio on the North-South Line). LTA's proposed Seletar Line (announced March 2026) is being studied to serve the northeast long-term.

ICON.note: 99-year leasehold (2007) Far East Organization development of 646 units, roughly 180m from Tanjong Pagar MRT (East-West Line). Long-term upside from the Greater Southern Waterfront as Tanjong Pagar port relocates to Tuas by around 2027.

ONE-NORTH RESIDENCES.note: 99-year leasehold, 405 units, TOP 2009, developed by a UOL/Kheng Leong joint venture and walkable to one-north MRT (Circle Line) within the one-north business and R&D hub. Newer competing supply nearby includes One-North Eden and Bloomsbury Residences at Media Circle.

THE BERTH BY THE COVE.note: 99-year leasehold, 200 units, TOP 2006, developed by Ho Bee Land as Sentosa Cove's first waterfront condo with private boat berths. Sentosa Cove has been hit by the 60% foreigner ABSD (April 2023), with up to about 66% of resale transactions loss-making in 2025.

ALEXIS.note: Freehold mixed-use development of roughly 293 units sitting above Anchorpoint mall and within walking distance of Queenstown MRT (East-West Line). It sits on the northern edge of the Greater Southern Waterfront redevelopment zone.

THE COAST AT SENTOSA COVE.note: 99-year leasehold, 249 units, TOP 2009, on Sentosa Cove. Non-landed Sentosa Cove prices fell roughly 18.7% from a 2023 peak with about 66% of resales loss-making in 2025, weighed down by the 60% foreigner ABSD.

GUILLEMARD EDGE.note: Freehold development of 275 units, TOP 2015, by Macly Group, featuring SOHO/home-office units and located off Guillemard Road near Dakota and Aljunied MRT stations.

STARLIGHT SUITES.note: Freehold boutique development of 105 units, TOP 2014, at 11 River Valley Close in District 9, developed by Meadows Property (Singapore).

THE WOODGROVE.note: 99-year leasehold (from 1996), boutique 72-unit apartment, TOP 1998, in Woodlands. Key connectivity catalyst is the Johor Bahru-Singapore RTS Link targeting passenger service by end-2026/early 2027 from Woodlands North to JB.
